strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React in enterprise environments
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
Strong problem-solving and collaboration skills evidenced by cross-functional contributions and mentorship
concerns: Limited evidence of proficiency in Nest.js (primary stack requirement)
No explicit mention of Vitest or Playwright (testing framework requirement)
Inconsistent duration in recent roles (APRIL 2025 — PRESENT) raises questions about job stability
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React in multiple enterprise roles, including AI-agent tooling. However, the resume lacks evidence of Nest.js (primary stack requirement) and testing framework expertise (Vitest/Playwright). The brief tenure in the most recent role (since April 2025) is also concerning.
